title: Iran signals it will hit US, Israeli economic and tech targets
summary_full: Iran's Tasnim news agency published a list of potential targets for Iran, including the offices of tech giants such as Amazon, Google, Microsoft and Nvidia in Gulf countries and Israel
summary_public: Iran's Tasnim news agency published a list of potential targets for Iran, including the offices of tech giants such as Amazon, Google, Microsoft and Nvidia in Gulf countries and Israel

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Iran signals it will hit US, Israeli economic and tech targets

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran signals it will hit US, Israeli economic and tech targets
